title: rinorea uniflora
intro: Rinorea uniflora, also known as the one-flowered Rinorea, is a flowering plant species in the family Violaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and other ailments. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimalarial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of malaria. Rinorea uniflora can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a natural and accessible way.
